title: AI Sales Engineer
company_focus:
Business management software for technology solution
providers
description:
ConnectWise is an industry and Global leading software
company with over 3,000 colleagues in North America, EMEA
and APAC. As a community-driven software company dedicated
to the success of technology solution providers, our suite
helps over 45,000 of our partners manage their businesses
better, sell more efficiently, automate service delivery,
and remotely control technology so they can consistently
deliver amazing customer experiences.

Our company is powered by our connections, our colleagues,
and our community. And, we accept all kinds.

Game-changers, innovators, culture-lovers—and humankind.

We invite discovery and debate. We recognize key moments as
milestones.

We see you and value you for your unique contributions. Our
inclusive, positive culture lays the foundation to ensure
every colleague is valued for their perspectives and skills,
giving you the choice of how YOU make a difference.

Curious? Read this opportunity to learn how YOU can make a
difference at ConnectWise!

General Summary:

The AI Sales Engineer is a highly skilled, consultative
technical sales professional responsible for driving new
business and expanding existing accounts through expertise
in artificial intelligence, automation, and data-driven
solutions. This role evaluates customer needs, identifies
opportunities for AI adoption, and demonstrates how our AI
platform and services deliver measurable business value. AI
Sales Engineers articulate the company’s value proposition,
provide technical guidance throughout the sales cycle, and
relay customer insights to influence future product
development. They leverage deep technical knowledge of AI/ML
technologies, automation workflows, and data infrastructure
to support sales efforts, generate pipeline, and ensure
successful customer onboarding and implementation.

Essential Duties and Responsibilities:

- Represent both the technical and functional aspects of our
  AI platform, automation tools, and integrated partner
  solutions, clearly articulating how they address customer
  challenges.
- Deliver high-impact technical demonstrations, product
  walkthroughs, and presentations tailored to both technical
  and business audiences.
- Lead proof-of-concepts (POCs) and pilot engagements that
  showcase the value of AI models, automation workflows, and
  data-driven insights.
- Translate customer requirements into scalable AI solution
  designs, including model selection, data integration,
  workflow automation, and deployment considerations.
- Develop and execute standard or customized POCs, trials, and
  sandbox environments to help prospects evaluate AI
  capabilities.
- Work independently or collaboratively with sales teams to
  position AI solutions in a consultative manner, guiding
  customers through capability assessments and ROI analysis.
- Prepare and contribute to technical RFP/RFQ responses,
  including architecture diagrams, integration plans, and
  security documentation.
- Serve as a key technical resource for revenue teams by
  providing product expertise, training, coaching, and
  ongoing support.
- Maintain a strong understanding of AI sales methodologies,
  including objection handling, business case development,
  and technical deal qualification.
- Stay current on AI/ML technologies, LLM advancements,
  automation frameworks, and industry trends through
  continuous learning.
- Maintain excellent CRM hygiene by documenting all
  activities, technical notes, and engagement details
  throughout the presales cycle.

Knowledge, Skills, and/or Abilities Required:

- 3+ years of experience as a Pre-Sales Engineer, Solutions
  Architect, or Technical Consultant supporting AI, ML,
  automation, or data-driven products.
- Proven track record in technical sales with the ability to
  identify opportunities, influence stakeholders, and drive
  complex technical evaluations.
- Strong understanding of AI/ML concepts, including model
  training, inference, vector databases, data pipelines, and
  prompt engineering.
- Working knowledge of cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, GCP),
  APIs, data integration, and automation frameworks.
- Familiarity with LLMs, generative AI, RAG architectures, and
  enterprise AI deployment patterns.
- Ability to evaluate competitive AI solutions and articulate
  strengths, weaknesses, and differentiators.
- Experience working with MSPs, VARs, technology service
  providers, enterprise IT, or AI-focused solution partners.
- Excellent communication and interpersonal skills with the
  ability to simplify complex technical topics.
- High energy, curiosity, adaptability, and a collaborative
  mindset.
- CRM experience (Salesforce or equivalent).

Working Conditions:

- Professional office or remote work environment.
- Occasional extended hours to meet deadlines, support
  customer evaluations, or attend events.
- Fast-paced atmosphere within a rapidly evolving AI
  technology landscape.
- Travel of 20% or more may be required.

ConnectWise is an Equal Opportunity Employer, dedicated to
building a diverse and inclusive workforce and providing a
workplace free from discrimination and harassment.
ConnectWise provides equal employment opportunities to all
employees and applicants without regard to race, ethnicity,
color, religion, age, sex (including pregnancy), sexual

ancestry, national origin, citizenship status, physical or
mental disability, genetic information, military/veteran
status, marital status, familial or parental status, or any
other characteristic or status protected by applicable
federal, state and local laws.

The statements above are intended to describe the general
nature and level of work being performed by individuals
assigned to this job. Other duties may be assigned as
needed. Reasonable accommodations may be made to enable
qualified individuals with disabilities to perform the
essential functions of the job and/or to receive other
benefits and privileges of employment. If you need a
reasonable accommodation for any part of the application and
hiring process, please contact us at
talentacquisition@connectwise.com or 1-800-671-6898.

use_cases: Business management automation for technology solution providers
AI-powered service delivery and operational efficiency for MSPs and VARs

ai_classification_reasoning:
This is a pre-sales engineering role focused on
demonstrating, designing, and selling AI solutions rather
than building or deploying models. The role involves
technical consulting, POCs, and solution architecture for
customers but does not include hands-on model development,
training, or deployment work.
